explanation: The user instructs to clear the sink first by removing all objects currently inside it, such as the spraybottle and pepper shaker, and then wash the dirty mug. The sink currently has spraybottle_0 and peppershaker_0 inside it, and mug_0 is on top of the sink. Since the old plan only partially attempted to turn on the faucet and pick up the mug, I first remove all objects from the sink by picking them up and placing them on the countertop. Then, I place the dirty mug into the sinkbasin to begin washing it by turning the faucet on and off. After cleaning, I continue with the remaining not-attempted steps from the old plan, which include picking up the mug and possibly placing it elsewhere. The plan ensures all objects are cleared from the sink before washing the mug.
